intro: Monanthos planicaulis, also known as Phlomis planicaulis, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine, exhibiting health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments, including wounds and infections. The bioactive constituents of Monanthos planicaulis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and iridoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Monanthos planicaulis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used to make tonics and extracts that are used to treat a range of health conditions.
